title: Foregone Conclusion
description: Next turn, put [blue]3[/blue] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: Next turn, put [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Counter-based effect that triggers during the hand draw phase. Each stack increases the number of cards drawn next turn. The player selects which cards to add to their hand from their draw pile. Power is removed after triggering.
